inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable in which to check for the existence of a hashtable element.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Hashtable element to be checked for.

outputs.name: containsKey
outputs.description: Indicates whether the specified hashtable element exists. A value of: true indicates that the element exists. false indicates that the element does not exist.

inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable from which to retrieve the specified value.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Key of the hashtable element whose value is to be retrieved.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Value of the input hashtable element.

inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable from which the keys are to be listed.

outputs.name: keys
outputs.description: List of keys stored in the input hashtable.

inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable to which the key/value pair is to be added.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Key of the element to be added to the hashtable.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value of the element to be inserted into the hashtable.

outputs.name: hashtable
outputs.description: Hashtable object after the insertion of the key/value pair.

inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable from which to remove the key/value pair.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Key of the hashtable element to be removed.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value of the hashtable element to be removed.

outputs.name: hashtable
outputs.description: Hashtable object after the key/value pair is removed.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Value of the hashtable element that was removed. Returns null if the input key is not found in the hashtable.

inputs.name: hashtable
inputs.description: Hashtable from which the number of elements stored in it is to be retrieved.

outputs.name: size
outputs.description: Number of elements in the hashtable.
